notes: Despite all this, if you're on a Deck or just want to play offline, you'll have a lot of fun!

title: Plants vs. Zombies™ Garden Warfare 2: Deluxe Edition

notes:
As of right now, and without any change or fix in sight, the game is unplayable on steam deck. It will allow you to login to your origin account and download the game, but will come up with a wine not supported error. EA have publicly stated they do NOT PLAN TO MAKE THIS GAME COMPATIBLE WITH PROTON.

EA pushed a new anticheat over a year ago, which was meant to target a bit "ban hack" exploit that was going around. This anticheat is kernal level, and specifically blocks compatibility layers like wine and proton. It is impossible to get around this using steam OS. 

There is a way to play it still on a steam deck however. The solution I found is dual booting windows on to steamdeck, and running the game off windows OS. I wouldnt recommend this option if you have less than a 512gb NVME SSD.
title: Plants vs. Zombies™ Garden Warfare 2: Deluxe Edition
